The 󠀱n󠀠e󠁥w 󠁕To󠀶ttenh󠀿a󠁑m 󠁕Hot󠁣sp󠀨u󠁬r󠁔 Stad󠁛i­󠀤um󠀺, 󠀩a󠀔lso󠀘 kno󠀲wn as Tottenham Hotspur Stadium or simply the New Wembley Stadium, is being constructed in the City of Westminster, London.
